request_payload.exposure_text: As we get older, we remember the Cold War. We remember the threats we faced and the alliances that kept us safe. Today, some politicians want to weaken our commitments, saying we should focus only on ourselves. But isolationism never made us safer. Our alliances deter aggression and share the burden. Remember: when we stand together, we stand stronger. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
